programs.title: Comfort Food With Spencer Watts
programs.desc: Spencer creates dressed-up comfort food with chicken kiev with thai red curry butter and lemongrass whipped potatoes.

programs.title: Comfort Food With Spencer Watts
programs.desc: Spencer prepares Chinese 5-spice chicken halves with apple slaw and fries, a lamb bolognese on polenta and a spiced pork loin.

programs.title: Comfort Food With Spencer Watts
programs.desc: The crew indulge their sweet tooth with: fun fetti donuts, PB & J-inspired stuffed cookies, and decadent decked out carrot cake waffles.

programs.title: Comfort Food With Spencer Watts
programs.desc: We snack on pepperoni arroncini risotto pops, puffed millet and cornmeal coated chicken bites, and popcorn margaritas with margarita popcorn

programs.title: Comfort Food With Spencer Watts
programs.desc: Spencer's game day food includes: BBQ beef and bacon armadillo eggs, dill pickle chicken wings, and skillet-baked cambozola.

programs.title: Comfort Food With Spencer Watts
programs.desc: Spencer makes: a flavour packed spaetzle mac and cheese, beer cheese soup with goat cheese.
